data.title: Harley-Davidson Apparel, Riding Gear, and FREE WHEEL FRIDAYS Drive Rider Engagement at Tilley Harley-Davidson of Statesville
data.description: Tilley Harley-Davidson in Statesville, North Carolina announced on May 29, 2026, the return of FREE WHEEL FRIDAYS. This weekly promotion aims to engage the rider community by offering a wide range of Harley-Davidson apparel, motorcycle riding gear, and lifestyle merchandise to customers for free. The event will provide an opportunity for riders to come together and enjoy the unique offerings.

data.title: Kane Biotech grants stock options to employees, boosting potential for growth.
data.description: According to recent reports, there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. The latest data indicates that there have been over 10,000 new confirmed cases in the past week alone, bringing the total number of cases to more than 150,000. This surge in infections has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals operating at close to full capacity. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: CFTC supports perpetual crypto contracts, allows 24/7 trading. Coinbase gets no-action while Kalshi gets approval.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) recently released notifications impacting platforms wanting to provide cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts. Among these notices is a no-action position granted to Coinbase, allowing them to proceed with offering these contracts. Additionally, Kalshi received approval from the CFTC to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts. This move signifies a notable development within the cryptocurrency trading space, with important regulatory decisions being made for these types of contracts.

data.title: NEUBERGER NEXT GENERATION CONNECTIVITY FUND ANNOUNCES MONTHLY DISTRIBUTION
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Neuberger Next Generation Connectivity Fund Inc. revealed a distribution declaration of $0.12 for each common stock share under its NYSE symbol NBXG. This distribution is slated for payment on June 30, 2026 and requires shareholders as of the record date on June 15, 2026 to be eligible.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK PREMIUM DIVIDEND FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: On May 29, 2026, John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund disclosed that it will issue a monthly distribution of $0.0825 per share. The Fund, listed on the NYSE as PDT, is managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC.
WESTGATE ENERGY ANNOUNCES Q1 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS

data.title: Fairfax Completes Sale of Portion of its Interest in Poseidon Corp.
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited disclosed the successful sale of 67,618,981 common shares of Poseidon Corp., the parent company of Seaspan Corporation. The shares were sold at a rate of US$28.30 per share, resulting in total earnings of around US$1.91 billion for Fairfax. The transaction also yielded a pre-tax realized profit of roughly US$837 million. The sale involved Fairfax and its affiliates.

data.title: ACTIVATE EXPANDS NORDIC FOOTPRINT WITH FIRST DENMARK LOCATION
data.description: Activate is continuing its growth in Europe by inaugurating its inaugural venue in Denmark today in Copenhagen. This marks the company's fourth establishment in the Nordic region. The expansion is part of Activate's partnership with Realinvest, a prominent Scandinavian real estate company.

data.title: CycleBar "Rides to the Moon" for National Bike Month, Turning Studios Nationwide Into One Massive Feat of Movement and Community
data.description: Over 100 CycleBar studios from the leading indoor cycling brand in the nation are coming together to achieve a collective goal of surpassing 694,481 miles in a single weekend. This distance is equivalent to the Artemis II mission. This event is set to take place in Charlottesville, VA on May 29, 2026.

data.title: NEUBERGER ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE AND INCOME FUND ANNOUNCES MONTHLY DISTRIBUTION
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Neuberger Energy Infrastructure and Income Fund Inc. declared a distribution of $0.07008 per share of common stock (NYSE American: NML). This distribution will be paid on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of a date to be specified.

data.title: Ark Financial Holding, Inc. to Acquire Cooper Lake Financial Corp.
data.description: In Cooper, Texas on May 29, 2026, it was announced that Cooper Lake Financial Corporation, known as Cooper Lake, and Ark Financial Holding, Inc., or Ark, have reached a definitive agreement for Ark to purchase Cooper Lake, the parent company of The First National Bank in Cooper. This acquisition marks a significant development in the financial sector, emphasizing the consolidation trend within the industry. The specifics of the transaction, including the financial terms and any regulatory approvals needed, have not been disclosed yet. This move will likely have a substantial impact on the local financial landscape, affecting customers, employees, and stakeholders associated with The First National Bank in Cooper. The agreement between Cooper Lake and Ark signifies a strategic decision likely driven by the current economic environment and a desire to enhance market positioning. Stay tuned for more updates as this acquisition progresses.

data.title: Colorado State University Global Commencement Features Two Emmy-Award Winning Speakers
data.description: More than 2,100 graduates commemorated the completion of their degrees at the National Western Center and through virtual means. On May 29, 2026, Colorado State University Global (CSU Global) marked the achievement of over 2,100 undergraduate and graduate students receiving their diplomas.

data.title: Less Effort, More Living: CASEKOO Launches Ultimate LinKOO Collection
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Los Angeles, CASEKOO, a leading global brand in phone accessories, launched their new LinKOO Collection. The collection aims to cater to working professionals and has already garnered a cult following. Known for their creativity and innovation, CASEKOO introduces this ultimate collection as a tribute to timeless romance. This new range offers a diverse and striking array of phone accessories designed for a global audience.

data.title: PBF Energy to Participate in Bank of America Energy and Power Credit Conference
data.description: On May 29, 2026, PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) revealed that its management team will take part in the Bank of America Energy and Power Credit Conference on June 3, 2026. During the conference, key members of the company will engage with industry professionals. Interested parties can access any presentation materials shared during the event through the specified platform.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Closes Above 51,000; Nasdaq, S&P 500 Make History (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index reached a peak on Friday fueled by optimism surrounding a potential U.S.-Iran agreement. Nvidia and Tesla experienced declines in contrast to Dell, which emerged as a major victor. The Dow closed above the 51,000 mark, with both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 also making record highs during this eventful trading day.

data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. Announces Availability of 2025 Sustainability Report
data.description: In Monaco on May 29, 2026, Safe Bulkers, Inc. (NYSE: SB), a global company offering marine drybulk transportation services, released its 2025 Sustainability Report. This report is now accessible for download on the company's website.

data.title: REDESIGNED STIIIZY CARTRIDGE APPROVED BY FEDERAL AGENCY
data.description: As of May 29, 2026, STIIIZY has received clearance for the purchase and sale of their newly designed cartridges by retailers. The U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) has confirmed that the redesigned cartridges do not violate any of PAX Lab's patents. This ruling allows the company to proceed with selling the cartridges without any legal restrictions. The clearance opens up opportunities for retailers to offer the redesigned cartridges, resulting in potential increased sales and market access for STIIIZY.

data.title: Celebrate World Digestive Health Day With Gundry MD Bio Complete 3, A Unique Supplement That Is Redefining Gut Health Support
data.description: A cutting-edge daily digestive health formula containing prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics has been introduced by Gundry MD®, in celebration of World Digestive Health Day. This supplement, known as Gundry MD Bio..., combines all three components into one powerful blend. The product has gained significant popularity among consumers for its comprehensive approach to gut health. The innovative formula aims to promote digestive wellness by providing a holistic solution for maintaining a healthy gut.
